cargo_mission.duplicate_relationships: Duplicate related locations are not allowed
cargo_mission.load_desc: The task that will be read when going to this storage location to pick up goods
cargo_mission.offload_desc: The task that will be read when going to this storage location to release the goods
cargo_mission.yaw_desc: This angle will be used if the sub-mission angle with rotation in dynamic_mission is set to 'Auto (Fast Mission Frame Direction)'
cargo_mission.prepare_point_desc: When dynamic_mission is selected, if 'Automatic (preset pre-assignment point)' is specified, this location ID will be imported
cargo_mission.priority_desc: Set a number (0-1000) to determine the priority of this location for sending or receiving goods. Higher values ​​will take precedence over other locations with lower values. For example, when releasing goods, a destination with a priority of 20 will be released before a destination with a priority of 15. Conversely, when picking up goods, a destination with a priority of 15 will be picked up before a destination with a priority of 20
cargo_mission.relationships_desc: Define connections to other locations for cargo placement. Select 'Fixed' for strict source-destination pairs (e.g., only to one location). Select 'Non-Fixed' for flexible placement, allowing cargo to move to backup locations if the primary is unavailable.

layer_form.invalid_level_name: Name cannot contain spaces or hyphens; Level name can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.

edit_shelf_panel.config_tooltip: Click on the storage location on the map to edit related parameters
edit_shelf_panel.warn: edit shelf category might clear exist shelf data, please ask programer to when edit

edit_shelf_category.delete_warning: Delete will cause other shelf is using this category become default shelf.

import_map.title: Import Points, Paths, and Zones from Another Script
import_map.info: This feature will copy points, paths, and zones from another script into the currently selected script. If any data already exists, it will not be overwritten.
import_map.confirm_content: Are you sure you want to import this script? This action may overwrite existing data.

charge.name: mission name
charge.amrId_required: Please select at least one AMR ID
charge.passiveThreshold_max: Aggressive threshold must be at most 70%
charge.aggressive_max: Aggressive threshold must be at most 70%
charge.full_rate_min: Full charge threshold must be at least 70%
charge.available_min: Available task threshold must be at least 11%
charge.threshold_note_desc: Configure battery thresholds to manage charging behavior. Aggressive threshold triggers immediate charging, while full threshold indicates when charging is complete.
charge.tooltip_aggressive: Battery level to trigger immediate charging
charge.tooltip_passive: Battery level for passive charging mode
charge.tooltip_available_get_task: Minimum battery level to accept new tasks

model.name: Name
model.ip_invalid: The input is not a valid IP address!

quick_mission.load_tooltip: Select a shelf to load cargo from
quick_mission.offload_tooltip: Select a shelf to offload cargo to
quick_mission.click_shelves_or_cancel: Click the shelves in the map or press ESC to cancel

task_form_fork.control_warn: Please add at least one control sequence

add_mission.title: Edit Mission
add_mission.name: mission name
add_mission.tag_warn: You must select either 'dynamic-mission' or 'normal-mission' as a tag, but you cannot select both at the same time.
add_mission.tag_info: 'Dynamic-mission' tags are used for quick tasks that require specific settings, while 'normal-mission' tags are for standard task assignments. For more details, please refer to the usage instructions in the tag editing section.
add_mission.normal_mission_tag_description: A 'normal-mission' tag is used for tasks where each subtask has predefined, fixed parameters, such as location, shelf height, and rotation angle. These parameters are typically set to 'custom,' allowing you to manually input the values for each subtask.
add_mission.dynamic_mission_tag_description: A 'dynamic-mission' tag is designed for quick-pickup tasks where certain subtask parameters, such as location, shelf height, and rotation angle, are set to 'automatic.' When a task with this tag is assigned, the system automatically selects a storage slot and retrieves its details (e.g., location, shelf height, rotation angle). These details are then dynamically applied to the subtask, enabling faster task dispatching.
add_mission.force: When this tag is present, dispatching this task will immediately elevate its priority to the highest level (note: this is not an inserted task).

mission_list.wait_amr_warn: if you has wait other car, please insert both wait amr and wait type

task_table.camera_config_info: This setting defines the height at which the recognition camera observes the pallet. If the camera is mounted above the forks, set it to the same height as the forks. If it's mounted below, set it to a height higher than the forks.
task_table.special_movement_info: Most of the time this function is not needed, it is mainly used to exchange goods between two vehicles.
task_table.spin_warn: If the action is a rotation, the action type must have S
task_table.fork_height_tooltip: Choose how to set the forklift height: 'Custom' allows you to enter a specific height, 'Auto' uses the shelf height in the quick task, 'Default' sets the height to 350mm.
task_table.fork_height_custom_desc: Manually enter the forklift height in mm.
task_table.fork_height_select: Automatic (use quick task's or mission control auto assign fork height)
task_table.fork_height_select_desc: Automatically set forklift height to shelf height when using quick tasks.
task_table.fork_height_default_desc: Set forklift height to a fixed 350mm.
task_table.fork_height_level_desc: Number of levels of the fork slot at the location
task_table.wait_other_amr_required: Please select a robot to wait for.
task_table.location_tooltip: Choose how to set the location: 'Custom' lets you enter a specific location ID, 'Auto' uses the location from a fast-mission, and 'Auto (Idle Charge Station)' finds an available charging station.
task_table.location_custom_desc: Manually select a location ID from the available options.
task_table.location_select_desc: Automatically sets the location based on the fast-mission.
task_table.location_charge_station_desc: Automatically finds an available charging station.
task_table.yaw_tooltip: Choose how to set the yaw: 'Custom' lets you enter a specific degree, 'Auto' uses the shelf direction from a fast-mission, and 'Auto (Calculate at Shelf)' calculates the yaw when the AMR reaches the shelf.
task_table.yaw_custom_desc: Manually enter the yaw angle in degrees (0–360).
task_table.yaw_select_desc: Automatically sets the yaw to the target shelf's direction in a fast-mission.
task_table.yaw_calculate_desc: Calculates the yaw when the AMR reaches the front of the target shelf.
task_table.yaw_range: Yaw must be between -180 and 180 degrees.

mission_reject_reason.title: Mission Assignment Rejection Reasons
mission_reject_reason.cat1_1: Higher priority mission exists in queue
mission_reject_reason.cat1_2: Another pending mission has an earlier order number
mission_reject_reason.cat1_3: System processes missions in priority order
mission_reject_reason.cat2_2: No AGV found that can handle this mission
mission_reject_reason.cat2_3: All AGVs are busy or unavailable
mission_reject_reason.cat2_4: Specified AGVs are not available (offline, busy, or unregistered)
mission_reject_reason.cat3_1: AGV maintenance level blocks this mission type
mission_reject_reason.cat3_2: None of the specified AGVs pass maintenance check
mission_reject_reason.cat4_2: Path contains invalid or non-existent location(s)
mission_reject_reason.cat4_4: No valid path between start and destination
mission_reject_reason.cat4_5: AGV path is blocked by cargo or bookings
mission_reject_reason.cat5_1: AGV status or payload is unavailable
mission_reject_reason.cat5_4: AGV is already executing another mission
mission_reject_reason.cat6_3: AGV at charging station requires exit clearance
mission_reject_reason.cat7_1: AGV has cargo and cannot proceed to charging station
